focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The STAR MAN observes a Volvo arriving at a house below, where Jenny Haydn exits with a welcome sign as voices express joy over Mrs. Haydn's return.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jenny Haydn returns home and is greeted by friends who express joy at her return, signaling her reconnection with the local community.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: reestablishing normal life after a break
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: physically present at home and acknowledged by friends upon return
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: reason for absence not yet revealed

relation_updates: reconnected with friends
support network acknowledges her return

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jenny goes downstairs, takes out garbage; STAR MAN attempts entry but retreats to shadows. He vanishes before she returns for the second can.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jenny exits her home to take out garbage, unknowingly interrupting the Star Man's attempt to enter; he retreats to the shadows and vanishes before she returns.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: remains unaware of being watched or nearly discovered
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Star Man's intentions toward her remain unclear
evidence_quotes: The STAR MAN stands just outside the light-fall in the back yard watching her.
She disappears into the kitchen. Without warning the door ahead of him is swung open and Jenny rushes out.
The STAR MAN barely has time to step into the shadows.
When she comes back for the second one we see that the STAR MAN is no longer in the shadows.

relation_updates: proximity to Star Man increases without awareness
status_updates: active at night performing household tasks

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jenny stops struggling, pleads as STAR MAN examines her wrist; she screams, attacks him when he lifts her skin, flashes occur, and she flees upstairs as he recovers to pursue.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jenny is physically examined when Star Man lifts a piece of skin from her wrist, prompting her to scream and attack him before fleeing.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: survival and escape
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: traumatized and fleeing upstairs after resisting Star Man's examination
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Star Man recovers and begins pursuing her
evidence_quotes: Holding her with his eyes he grasps one of Jenny's hands and lifts it up to look at it.
He raises a piece of skin off her wrist, rolls it between his thumb and forefinger.
Jenny lets out a blood-curdling scream and strikes out at him.
The ferocity of her attack knocks him aside and she sprints up the stairs.

relation_updates: adversarial relationship with Star Man established
status_updates: shifts from fear to active resistance

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jenny hears a disconnected phone, hangs up, sits by the bed, hears a helicopter, unlocks the door, checks the empty hallway with her gun ready, and exits the room.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jenny retrieves a .45 from her closet, arms herself, and cautiously re-enters the house.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: defend herself and assess threat
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: armed and moving cautiously through the house
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: uncertainty about Star Man's location
evidence_quotes: She slams the door in his face and locks it.
Jenny throws open the closet and begins rummaging madly through the side pockets of her jackets and coats.
She finds it in the pocket of a down jacket. The Army issue .45 looks big in her hand.
With the gun ready, she turns the knob and opens the door a crack. The hallway is empty.

status_updates: shifts from panic to controlled action

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The STAR MAN takes Jenny's gun, drops it, and continues transforming his body with a light dot on his cheek as a helicopter hovers overhead, searchlight scanning nearby.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jenny sees Star Man using a photograph to transform his face into that of a man from her past, causing her to lower her weapon and break down.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: disarmed and emotionally shattered
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Star Man continues his transformation with unknown intentions as a helicopter hovers overhead
evidence_quotes: The STAR MAN is holding an 8x10 color photograph of Jenny and a man in his mid-twenties standing on a beach in their bathing suits.
The dot of light is copying the man's features onto the STAR MAN'S translucent head.
Jenny begins to tremble and lowers the gun. JENNY (in a small voice) No... please don't...
She sags against the armchair, racked by sobs that are drowned out by the FLAP OF THE APPROACHING HELICOPTER.

relation_updates: power dynamic shifts—Star Man gains complete control

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The alien, left behind after his ship fled, discusses the incident with Jenny, who sympathizes; he asks if she is his friend, and they affirm their friendship.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jenny explains the concept of friendship to Star Man, and they mutually affirm their friendship.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to connect and provide emotional clarity
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jenny and Star Man have established a clear, reciprocal understanding of being friends.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Star Man's isolation and uncertain future on Earth
evidence_quotes: JENNY A friend is a person that is good to you... someone you like to be with... someone you like to laugh with...
STAR MAN He was a good friend...
STAR MAN Are you my friend?
JENNY Yes.

relation_updates: forms mutual friendship with Star Man
status_updates: becomes trusted companion to Star Man
auxiliary.persona_anchor: empathetic bridge between human and alien

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The Star Man carries injured, blood-soaked Jenny through a fence into a grove of trees for cover, taking her purse as he flees with her in his arms.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: The Star Man carries Jenny through a fence into a grove of trees to hide from pursuing patrol cars and a helicopter, taking her purse and shielding her from immediate danger.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: hidden in a grove of trees, critically wounded and bleeding, now in the Star Man's arms
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: need for medical help
evidence_quotes: Jenny is soaked in her own blood.

relation_updates: relationship solidified through physical rescue
status_updates: moved from vehicle to forest cover

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The STAR MAN tends to Jenny's wounds as a truck swerves on the highway, his fatigue visible under passing headlights while he wipes blood from her shoulder.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Star Man uses light from his body to heal Jenny's facial wound and begin treating her neck injuries, showing visible fatigue as he does so.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: treat Jenny's injuries despite fatigue
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jenny's cheek wound is fully closed without scarring; neck wounds are partially healed, with healing light still active under her skin.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: long-term effects of healing and Star Man's deteriorating condition
evidence_quotes: He finds a deep glass cut on her cheek and two entry points in her neck.
It tumbles across to Jenny's cheek and settles into the wound.
one end of the wound flares brightly for an instant, then dies. The flesh left behind has been closed without a scar.
He sends two pieces of light plunging into the wounds. Immediately, they spread into halos which we can SEE radiating from under the skin.

relation_updates: intimate care through wound treatment
asymmetrical dependence reinforced
status_updates: Jenny's cheek wound healed without scar
neck wounds in process of healing
auxiliary.persona_anchor: recipient of alien healing with emotional consequences

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jenny discovers a green ring on her finger that speaks with the Star Man's voice, thanking her for help and explaining he can now return to his ship alone after healing her.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: awakening to absence and receiving message
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jenny wakes up healed with no scars and discovers a green ring that speaks with the Star Man's voice, thanking her and stating he can now return to his ship alone.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Jenny realizes the Star Man has left and is alone in the moving truck
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jenny is physically healed and in possession of a green ring that communicated the Star Man's departure; she is alone in the moving truck
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The purpose of the ring and whether the Star Man will return is unclear
evidence_quotes: STAR MAN (V.O.) Jennyhay... Jenny drops the ring as if she'd been stung.

relation_updates: Star Man expresses gratitude and severs direct contact

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 165、INT. SIT-DOWN PHONE BOOTH - DINER HALLWAY - DAY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jenny Haydn calls the highway patrol, identifying herself as a kidnapping victim from Eau Claire, Wisconsin, now free and returning home, concerned for her safety.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: disclosing abduction and asserting control over return
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jenny contacts the highway patrol, identifies herself as a kidnapping victim from Eau Claire, Wisconsin, and states she is returning home on her own.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: ensure safe passage without intervention during transit
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: has declared her survival and current return to authorities
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: fear of being intercepted or harmed during return
evidence_quotes: JENNY My name's Jenny Haydn. I think you're looking for me. I was kidnapped in Eau Claire, Wisconsin a couple of days ago. But I'm free now.
I'm on my way home and I don't want anybody I'm with shot at when you...

relation_updates: initiates contact with law enforcement as a self-advocate
status_updates: officially re-enters public system as a survivor
takes active step to prevent violent rescue

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: A Star Man and Jenny share a quiet moment, exchanging a green ring and discussing friendship; she asks him to include his singing in a book for her baby, hoping it will bring joy.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: emotional and symbolic exchange before parting
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jenny decides to keep the green ring as a keepsake and asks the Star Man to include his singing in a book for her baby, creating a lasting personal connection.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: seeking meaningful ways to preserve the Star Man's presence for her child
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jenny commits to keeping the green ring and requests the Star Man's singing be included in a book for her unborn child
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: how to explain the Star Man's role in the baby's life
evidence_quotes: She notices the green ring on her left hand and takes it off.
STAR MAN If you want to keep it, you can.
JENNY I'd like to...
She slips it back on her finger above her wedding band.

relation_updates: affirms mutual friendship
transforms ring from temporary token to lasting memento
status_updates: formalizes emotional bond through symbolic possession

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jenny watches a spacecraft depart, waves goodbye, and walks back as a super reveals she gave birth to a baby boy on March 10th.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jenny witnesses the Star Man's spacecraft depart with a final farewell gesture, then walks away as an on-screen text reveals she gave birth to a son on March 10th.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jenny is now a mother; the departure of the spacecraft marks the end of her direct connection with the Star Man.
evidence_quotes: The ship dips low over her, rocks itself in a gesture of farewell, then shoots off into the stars.
Jenny drops her wave with a sigh and starts back toward the Camaro.
we SUPER: JENNY HAYDN GAVE BIRTH TO AN EIGHT-POUND, SEVEN-OUNCE BABY BOY ON MARCH 10TH.

relation_updates: relationship with the Star Man becomes memory
status_updates: now a mother of a baby boy
auxiliary.persona_anchor: mother moving forward after the departure of the Star Man

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Jenny Haydn's journey begins with her return to normal life, only to be thrust into a traumatic encounter with the Star Man, who abducts and terrorizes her. Over time, their relationship evolves from captor-victim to one of mutual dependence, care, and emotional intimacy, culminating in a shared mission to help him return home. Ultimately, Jenny transforms from a passive survivor into an active protector and partner, concluding her arc as a mother to their child, bearing the emotional legacy of their connection.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Shermin and Major Bell discuss possible contamination and radar contact with a spaceship over Michigan; Bell insists on the threat despite lack of visual evidence, as they prepare to approach the site.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Shermin arrives at the landing site in a contamination suit and begins assessing the situation with Major Bell, expressing doubt about the extraterrestrial threat due to lack of visual evidence.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: assess the situation and determine credibility of extraterrestrial threat
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: on-site and conducting initial assessment with military personnel
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: uncertainty about biological hazard and whether the radar contact represents a real extraterrestrial threat
evidence_quotes: Shermin's unmarked S65 settles on the clearing.
The nose door is open and Shermin, carrying the hood of his contamination suit, comes down the ladder.
SHERMIN Can you see under the faceplate?
SHERMIN It could have been anything.

relation_updates: establishes working relationship with Major Bell

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The extraterrestrial's helmet emits sound and a projection of the escaped STAR MAN; a subtitle reads 'Mapmaker Wind. Do you hear me?' as Shermin realizes the other is alive.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: The alien helmet emits sound and projects an image of the escaped Star Man, accompanied by a subtitle asking 'Mapmaker Wind. Do you hear me?', leading Shermin to verbally acknowledge that the other alien is alive.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: respond to confirmed presence of a living alien
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: abandons skepticism and acknowledges the active presence of a living, communicating alien
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: intent and location of the living alien
evidence_quotes: a burst of percussive language, followed by a low buzz, comes from inside the extraterrestrial's helmet.
a projection beam shoots out of the helmet throwing the image of the escaped STAR MAN onto one of the scientists.
SUBTITLE Mapmaker Wind. Do you hear me?
SHERMIN (incredulous) The other one is alive!

relation_updates: shifts from skeptic to believer alongside Bell
auxiliary.persona_anchor: empirical mindset challenged by undeniable evidence

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Fox orders Shermin and Bell to locate the alive extraterrestrial, instructs them to contain it if found, and plans a cover story of a chemical spill while heading to the White House for support.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Shermin confirms the extraterrestrial encounter to Fox and receives instructions to locate and contain the surviving alien, defining the immediate operational objective.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: locate and contain the alive extraterrestrial
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: transitions from initial responder to active searcher with unclear containment parameters
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: the term 'contain' is not defined, leaving tactical and ethical ambiguity about how to handle the alien if found
evidence_quotes: SHERMIN (before Fox can speak) It's real, George.
SHERMIN Wait, wait... What are my orders if we find this thing?
FOX Contain it and get back to me.
SHERMIN What do you mean by 'contain?'

relation_updates: Shermin and George Fox maintain a direct, high-stakes command relationship
Shermin and Major Bell are assigned to work together on joint mission
status_updates: Shermin is now mission lead for ground search operation

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Authorities halt expanded search due to public panic concerns; Lyman's team continues alone while awaiting contact with the alien ship, deemed crucial for progress. Crew reflects on expendability.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Shermin learns the search will not be expanded due to public panic concerns and acknowledges his team's expendability.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: continue search without promised support
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: accepts that the team is operating without institutional backing and is considered expendable
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: can the mission succeed without institutional backing?
evidence_quotes: Don't let them do it this way, George. It's too important. We can't find this thing alone.
We always were.

relation_updates: Shermin's trust in Fox is strained by lack of support
status_updates: team is isolated and politically marginalized

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Shermin and Major Bell discuss strange clicking sounds from a helmet, linking them to a kidnapping in Eau Claire where the suspect used similar 'clicking gibberish,' possibly mistaken for drug-induced behavior.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Shermin discloses his failed marriage and expresses doubt about his personal worth, contrasting his professional skills with personal shortcomings.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: assessing personal and professional identity amid crisis
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: increased introspection and personal doubt following disclosure
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: tension between professional competence and personal failure

relation_updates: deepens rapport with Major Bell through personal disclosure
auxiliary.persona_anchor: competent agent with private emotional burden

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Shermin reports the extraterrestrial, disguised as the woman's dead husband, fled with her in a green Mustang; Fox recognizes Scott Haydn, escalating urgency.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Shermin reports that the extraterrestrial is active, armed with a .45, and has taken on the appearance of the woman's dead husband, fleeing in a green Mustang with her at gunpoint.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: contain the extraterrestrial
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: aware that the extraterrestrial is mobile, disguised, and in a populated area
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: risk of public exposure and potential violence during the pursuit
evidence_quotes: SHERMIN (V.O.) (his voice quavering) George, we've just confirmed the existence of the live extraterrestrial.
SHERMIN (V.O.) Well, we're in pursuit of a green Mustang...
SHERMIN (V.O.) Yes. It's kidnapped a woman at gunpoint and from what we can make out is forcing her to drive it somewhere.
SHERMIN (V.O.) No, no... A .45, it probably got it in the woman's house.

relation_updates: reinforces reporting relationship with Fox
status_updates: operating under high pressure in pursuit
auxiliary.persona_anchor: operating under high pressure while relaying urgent field intelligence

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The Security Council issues a ten-state bulletin for Scott and Jenny Haydn and their green Mustang, instructing officers to report but not approach, while Shermin, Bell, and Lyman debate how to respond to the potential alien threat.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Shermin reluctantly agrees to proceed with a high-risk public alert and assumes responsibility for planning the response to potential alien contact.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: prepare for containment despite lack of protocols
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: acknowledges unpreparedness but commits to leading the field response
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: no contingency plans for alien encounter
evidence_quotes: SHERMIN (sorting it out) You sure you want this, because... that's putting an awful lot of faith in people we have no control over...
SHERMIN (accepting) You'll get results one way or the other, that's for sure... Okay.
SHERMIN (to Bell) Did your people have any contingencies rehearsed? MAJOR BELL No... I guess we never thought it would happen.

relation_updates: asserts authority over Bell and Lyman
maintains tense but functional link with Fox
status_updates: in command of field response team

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Shermin retrieves the Star Man's suit from the Mustang, sends it back to the helicopter, and uses a bullhorn to call out to Mrs. Haydn in the woods, urging her to surrender peacefully.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Shermin discovers the Star Man's suit in the Mustang and takes charge by ordering evidence secured and initiating communication with Mrs. Haydn in the woods.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: secure suspects and de-escalate situation
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: assumes tactical command and shifts focus from pursuit to on-site coordination and peaceful negotiation
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether Mrs. Haydn will surrender peacefully
evidence_quotes: Shermin leads Bell, Lyman and the technicians to the car.
Shermin pushes the seat forward.
SHERMIN (to Bell, indicating the suit) Get this back to the copter.
SHERMIN (bullhorn to woods) Mrs. Haydn, please come out. We don't want to hurt you or your friend. Please put down your weapon and come out.

relation_updates: asserts leadership over Bell and Lyman

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Shermin believes the entity was scared, not threatening, urges reconsideration; FOX questions her judgment; entity moves west toward Grand Junction, possibly by land, with pursuit ongoing.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: field agent in conflict with command
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Shermin argues that the entity was scared, not hostile, based on his observations, and urges command to reconsider the threat assessment.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: capture the entity while advocating for a lower threat classification
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: feels personally criticized but maintains his assessment of the entity's behavior
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether the entity poses a genuine security threat or is acting out of fear remains unresolved
evidence_quotes: Stung, Shermin takes a deep breath, controls himself and returns the radio to his ear.
All I'm asking is that you people think about it.

relation_updates: tension with Fox escalates due to conflicting threat perceptions
auxiliary.persona_anchor: adherence to personal observation over command's threat narrative

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Fox plans to eliminate the shapeshifting target, but Shermin refuses, valuing the life form's uniqueness and opposing lethal action despite being ordered to join the mission.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Shermin refuses to participate in a lethal operation against the shapeshifting target, arguing that the being's uniqueness warrants a non-lethal approach and that they should attempt capture instead.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: capture the target alive through containment
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: removed from operational command and isolated from the mission, but remains committed to non-lethal resolution
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether the target can be captured without lethal force
evidence_quotes: We don't have to do it that way. We can catch him this time.
Give me twenty-four hours and I'll have him for you.
Then you're going to have to do it without me.
You're talking about taking a life. The most unique life form on this planet. I think we're better than that.

relation_updates: conflict with Fox over mission ethics

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Shermin confronts the Star Man, who seeks to reach his ship to return home without causing harm, but Shermin refuses to allow it.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Shermin refuses the Star Man's request to reach his ship, even after hearing that he only wants to go home without causing harm.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: prevent the Star Man from escaping to his ship
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: remains in position to block the Star Man's access to his ship, upholding his duty despite the alien's peaceful appeal
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: conflict between duty and empathy toward a non-hostile being
evidence_quotes: SHERMIN We can't let you do that.
STAR MAN (V.O.) I don't want to hurt anybody. I just want to go home.

relation_updates: establishes direct communication with Star Man
rejects Star Man's plea for peaceful departure
auxiliary.persona_anchor: duty-bound officer facing a moral dilemma

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Shermin aborts the mission, contacts George Fox, then cuts communication and orders his crew to leave.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: moral turning point under command pressure
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Shermin decides not to fire on Jenny and the STAR MAN, declares retirement, and cuts off communication with his superior.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: rejects mission objective under moral conflict
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: no longer compliant with command structure
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: consequences of desertion and defiance of orders
evidence_quotes: Shermin knows he can't do it.
SHERMIN I just retired.
Shermin flips a switch on the console that cuts Fox off.
SHERMIN (to his crew) Let's get out of here.

relation_updates: breaks communication with George Fox
asserts authority over crew by ordering retreat
auxiliary.persona_anchor: agent who chooses conscience over duty

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Shermin begins as a skeptical government investigator arriving at a suspected alien landing site, gradually accepting the reality of extraterrestrial contact. As the mission unfolds, he transitions from dutiful agent to morally conflicted commander, increasingly questioning institutional motives and the ethics of containment. His pursuit of the Star Man evolves into empathy, culminating in a refusal to carry out lethal orders. Shermin ultimately disobeys command, aborts the mission, and withdraws from operational duty, marking a quiet but definitive break with authority in defense of non-human life.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: A dying alien with coral-like skin and a glowing brain-mass loses consciousness as a white light spreads through his lung, while two men in a truck drive away, arguing about the rain.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Suffers suit breach and respiratory distress as Earth's atmosphere enters his system, leading to unconsciousness after a white light spreads through his lung.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: survival compromised due to environmental exposure
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: unconscious with active internal physiological change
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: life-support failure and abandonment in a hostile environment
evidence_quotes: He is gasping as our atmosphere mixes with his and threatens to suffocate him.
Behind the faceplate a piece of white light breaks off from the shining mass in the STAR MAN'S head and moves down his neck.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The Star Man awakens, checks his lung which has turned yellow ocher, breathes easily, assesses his damaged suit, and stands up.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Regains consciousness, observes lung adaptation to Earth's atmosphere, and resumes mobility despite suit damage.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: assess condition and seek escape
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: capable of independent action on Earth
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: damaged life-support suit, no communication
evidence_quotes: The STAR MAN stirs and awakens with a start.
He parts the tear in his suit and looks at his lung through his translucent body.
It has changed in color from brown to a rich yellow ocher.
He takes several deep breaths of our atmosphere and his lung expands and contracts easily.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The STAR MAN creates a blue force field displaying a solarized U.S. map with green and red dots in Wisconsin and Death Valley; he later dismisses it by compressing it into nothing.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Creates a holographic U.S. map with location markers after failing to contact his ally Mapmaker Wind, indicating reconnaissance and decision-making.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: establish contact and locate allies or objectives
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: initiates self-directed mission on Earth
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: no response from home or allies
evidence_quotes: STAR MAN (subtitle) Mapmaker Wind. Do you hear me?
His answer is nothing but the low buzz.
A green dot appears in the area of western Wisconsin, a red dot in the area of Death Valley, California.
After a long moment he reaches up and squeezes it into a ball that disappears when his palms come together.

relation_updates: communication with Mapmaker Wind failed

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jenny stops struggling, pleads as STAR MAN examines her wrist; she screams, attacks him when he lifts her skin, flashes occur, and she flees upstairs as he recovers to pursue.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Attempts to speak 'Wehave' while confronting Jenny, indicating early efforts to imitate human language during direct interaction.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Attempting to learn human speech for interaction.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Star Man has initiated physical contact and vocalization with a human but is met with fear and resistance, prompting a violent reaction and escape.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Can he successfully communicate without causing fear?
evidence_quotes: STAR MAN (precise) Wehave...
He presses her back against the wall and puts a mittened hand over her mouth.
Holding her with his eyes he grasps one of Jenny's hands and lifts it up to look at it.
The STAR MAN recovers and starts after her.

relation_updates: Star Man focuses on Jenny as a behavioral model

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: A man apologizes and retreats after intervening in Jenny's struggle with the armed Star Man, who then forces her to drive while keeping a gun to her face.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Uses a firearm to drive off a civilian who attempted to help Jenny, then reasserts control by forcing her into the vehicle and directing her to drive.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: eliminate outside intervention and maintain control
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jenny is forcibly restrained and compelled to drive under armed coercion, with the immediate threat of outside interference removed.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: ongoing risk of detection and intervention
evidence_quotes: The STAR MAN frees his right hand and blindly searches the floor for the gun.
shoving the barrel in the Man's face, barks a harsh command in his language.
The STAR MAN takes his hand off Jenny's mouth and slams her back into her seat.

relation_updates: intimidates third party into retreat
reasserts coercive control over Jenny

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The Star Man and Jenny arrive near Minneapolis, where he impresses her with a device that captures a 3D image of the skyline; Jenny then teaches him about cars needing gas, demonstrating as their vehicle runs out of fuel.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Learns that money is distinct from identity documents, practices smiling by imitating Jenny's photo, and uses a device to capture a 3D image of the Minneapolis skyline.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: understanding human symbols and emotions
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: demonstrates basic grasp of money, emotional expression, and technology use in a social context
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: initially confuses driver's license with money
evidence_quotes: STAR MAN Mi-chi-gan driver li-see-ens... Jennyhaydn... Money?
The STAR MAN looks at Jenny, back at the picture, then imitates the smile for Jenny.
He takes out his camera.
With a 'POP,' a cone of light flashes out. It sucks back, almost instantly, bringing with it a three-dimensional image of the skyline.

relation_updates: Jenny responds positively to Star Man's smile imitation, strengthening rapport
status_updates: learns and practices emotional expression through smiling

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The alien, left behind after his ship fled, discusses the incident with Jenny, who sympathizes; he asks if she is his friend, and they affirm their friendship.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Asks Jenny if she is his friend and, after her affirmation, declares her as his friend, showing a new understanding of human emotional bonds.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: seeking connection and understanding in an unfamiliar world
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: begins to adopt the human concept of friendship through direct interaction with Jenny
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: separated from his crew and still alien to human society
evidence_quotes: JENNY A friend is a person that is good to you... someone you like to be with... someone you like to laugh with...
STAR MAN Are you my friend?
JENNY Yes.
STAR MAN (smiles) I am your friend.

relation_updates: forms a confirmed friendship with Jenny
status_updates: emotionally exposed, left behind by his crew

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jenny is shot by a patrol car, severely injured. The Star Man crashes into the attacker's vehicle, but two other patrol cars close in, trapping him in a high-speed pursuit.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: The Star Man violently retaliates by ramming a patrol car after Jenny is shot, shifting from evasion to direct confrontation.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: protect Jenny and break pursuit
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: cornered and surrounded by police vehicles
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: survival in the face of overwhelming force
evidence_quotes: Bleeding badly, she slumps against the STAR MAN.
STAR MAN Jennyhaydn! Jennyhaydn!!
The STAR MAN slams the Mustang into it,
They've got him in a sandwich.

relation_updates: protective bond with Jenny confirmed under duress
lethal conflict with Eau Claire Police

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The Star Man heals Jenny's wounds with light, covers her with his windbreaker, and checks the satel compass to confirm he's on course while she sleeps.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Heals Jenny's wounds with light, covers her with his windbreaker, and checks the satel compass to confirm he is still on course.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: ensure Jenny's recovery and maintain mission trajectory
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jenny stabilized and resting, course confirmed
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: long-term safety still uncertain
evidence_quotes: With a chunk of light in his left hand, the STAR MAN dabs at the last of Jenny's wounds, leaving behind a phosphorescent bandage.
He checks her over to see if he's missed a wound. He hasn't.
He covers her with his windbreaker

relation_updates: deepened care for Jenny

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jenny initially resists but ultimately accepts the Star Man's offer to give her a baby with shared knowledge from both of them, despite her earlier belief that it was impossible.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Offers Jenny a baby that will inherit knowledge from both of them, claiming the ability to conceive despite her belief that it was impossible.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: offering Jenny a child with combined knowledge
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jenny accepts the offer and embraces him, indicating agreement to carry the child.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: the feasibility and nature of alien-human conception
evidence_quotes: STAR MAN I gave you a baby last night.
STAR MAN You will have this baby. If you want it. If you don't, I can stop it now.
JENNY I want it.

relation_updates: proposes parenthood with Jenny
establishes deep trust and emotional bond

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The STAR MAN modifies a drill by connecting wires to the electrical system, cutting and welding parts, and fitting components, all while Jenny watches.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Modifies a drill by connecting it to electrical components and welding a pipe to it, creating a custom tool.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to create a functional device for use in escaping or surviving
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Star Man completes a modified drill with a welded pipe and electrical connections, ready for use.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: true purpose and capability of the modified drill remains unclear
evidence_quotes: The STAR MAN shaves the rubber off the electrical lines leading into the fuse box
clips two wires of his own onto the exposed copper
cutting out the mid- section above the trigger
fitting electrical components into that area

relation_updates: Jenny observes Star Man's work, establishing silent witness and growing connection
status_updates: drill is transformed into a custom tool with welded pipe and electrical modifications

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jenny gives the Star Man books before he departs; he thanks her, shares a final kiss, and vanishes into his ship as she watches.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Completes farewell with Jenny, receives books, and boards his ship to leave Earth.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: fulfilled mission and personal connection
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: boarded ship and departed from Earth
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: future return uncertain
evidence_quotes: STAR MAN I must go.
I love you.
Tell the baby about me.
He takes them and kisses her again.

relation_updates: final affirmation of love with Jenny
acknowledges unborn child

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Star Man crash-lands on Earth, critically injured and isolated. He gradually adapts to the planet, learns human language and behavior through observation and interaction with Jenny, and forms a complex bond with her that evolves from coercion to mutual trust and affection. As he progresses toward his rendezvous, he demonstrates increasing emotional depth, technical ingenuity, and physical resilience, ultimately departing Earth after a transformative journey marked by conflict, connection, and sacrifice.
